Build something real. Box is expanding its UK Public Sector team — and we're looking for the next person to own this patch, bring the playbook, and make it their own.

$500–600k USD quota New business + expansion Local Government focus Hybrid · London
▶ Watch: Box Overview
Why Box, why now

Box has moved well beyond file storage. We are the trusted Content Cloud for 115,000+ organisations globally — including nearly 70% of the Fortune 500. What differentiates us in Public Sector is that our platform is built for security, compliance, and governance first, with AI layered in responsibly. That combination is resonating strongly with UK public bodies under pressure to modernise legacy systems without increasing risk. In regulated environments, our solution isn't discretionary — it's operationally critical.

The Numbers
350+
Local councils in the UK — a massive, largely untapped opportunity
$15–25k
Typical deal sizes, with reps regularly closing $50k–$100k+
$1M
First $1M deal just closed by the pod — proof of what's possible
The Opportunity

Why this is the right move

The upside

Own it end to end — and get paid for it

You land it, you grow it. Accounts don't get handed off to another team for upsell — you own the expansion and earn the commission on it. Land smaller if needed, build the relationship, grow the account.

A proven playbook, ready to adapt

The US team has built something strong in Local Gov

Box's US Public Sector team has developed a powerful motion in Local Government. You'll take that playbook, bring your own market knowledge, and build the UK version. See Box for Government →

Built in the UK

Two AEs who proved this works

Box's UK Public Sector focus is still in its early chapters — and it's already delivering. Barnaby was our first hire and smashed it. Anthony followed. Their success is why we're growing the team now.

Barnaby Newell
First Public Sector AE at Box UK. Under two years in and already proved the model. This role exists because of what he built.
Barnaby on LinkedIn
Anthony Prior
Joined off the back of Barnaby's success. Building pipeline and proving out the Local Government motion further.
Anthony on LinkedIn
Who We're Looking For

A self-starter. With hunger to match.

Hunter mentality — you're energised by net new pipeline, not intimidated by it
You'll lead a full POD — SDR, Sales Engineer, CSM, Renewals Manager — and know how to rally them around your accounts
Comfortable with Public Sector sales cycles — you understand the procurement landscape, the stakeholder complexity, the compliance-first mindset
Ambitious — you see a $15k deal as the start of something much bigger, not the finish line
Wants genuine ownership of strategy — events, verticals, GTM — and has the initiative to make things happen without waiting for permission
✅ Public Sector experience is important — Local Government is a bonus

We need someone who understands the Public Sector sales motion. It doesn't have to be Local Government specifically — central government, NHS, education, defence all count. What matters is you're not coming in blind to how public bodies buy.

In John's own words — what he's really looking for

Hiring Manager · Public Sector

⚡
Energy
Brings momentum and positivity to the team — even when things are hard.
🤝
Team-first mindset
Lifts others up, shares what works, never hoards knowledge. Humility is a strength here — no one wins alone.
🚀
Self-starter
Brings ideas and acts on them — doesn't wait for direction to get moving.
💪
Grit
Doesn't let a tough quarter affect their standard. Shows up the same every day.
🎯
CEO of your patch
Treats the territory like it's your business — orchestrates the account team, makes the calls, owns the outcome.
🧠
Commercial edge
Sees every small deal as the start of something bigger — and plans accordingly.

Sounds like your kind of role? No polished CV needed — just 15 minutes.

Interview Process

5 stages, no surprises

Click each stage to see who you're meeting, what we're exploring, and how to prepare.

1
Shannon Sweeney
Recruiter · Talent Acquisition
30 mins · Video▼
What we're exploring
AE experiencePublic Sector backgroundQuota attainmentDeal sizesMotivation for Box

Come ready to talk through your career story and what's drawing you to this role. Shannon will cover typical sales questions — complexity of your deals, quota history, average deal sizes, team structure and your Public Sector experience. No tricks, just a real conversation.

Shannon on LinkedIn
2
John Braddock
Hiring Manager · Known for hands-on coaching
45 mins · Video▼
What we're exploring
Sales methodologyPublic Sector experiencePipeline approachHunter mindsetDeal examples

John is a hands-on coach who genuinely invests in his team. Come with strong deal examples — how you've navigated complex procurement, built pipeline from scratch, and managed stakeholders across public bodies. Know your numbers and be ready to talk about how you think about territory strategy.

John on LinkedIn
3
Kenneth Mulholland
Culture Add · Values-based interview
30 mins · Video▼
What we're exploring
Box values in actionWho you are as a personHow you show up for others

Kenneth asks questions aligned to Box's values. For example: "Tell me about a time you received positive feedback — what did you do to earn it?" (10x it). Or "Describe a time you helped a colleague overcome a challenge" (Make mom proud). Be yourself.

Kenneth on LinkedIn
The values you'll be asked about
🚀 Take risks. Fail fast. GSD.

Big bets, constant iteration. Inaction is the real risk.

🤯 Blow customers' minds.

Not just good — ones they never imagined possible.

📈 10x it.

Dream big, then make it bigger.

🏆 Be an owner.

Act like it's your company.

💙 Make mom proud.

Do the right thing — always.

🙌 Bring your whole self.

Box is built on belonging.

4
Presentation · Panel
Kenneth Mulholland · Sophie Kelly · + stakeholders
Brief shared in advance1 hour · Video▼
What we're exploring
Account prioritisationDeal reviewTerritory strategyCommercial thinking

We want to see how you'd prioritise your accounts and approach a deal review. Shannon will share the brief in advance. Come prepared to show how you'd think about the UK Public Sector territory — which councils you'd target first and why — and walk the panel through a deal with real rigour.

Kenneth on LinkedIn Sophie on LinkedIn
5
Senior Leadership + Final with John
Samantha Wessels or Jamie Riley · John Braddock · back-to-back in office
In office · London60 mins▼
⚡ Two back-to-back 30-min sessions in the London office on the same day
Part 1 · Samantha or Jamie — Why Box
Why BoxWhy Public SectorLong-term ambition

Do your research on where Box is going — the AI content layer story, the Public Sector opportunity, the EMEA growth plan. Sam and Jamie want to understand your genuine motivation, not a rehearsed answer.

Samantha on LinkedIn Jamie on LinkedIn
Part 2 · John Braddock — Final Q&A
Final alignmentYour questionsMutual fit

Ask everything. Come with real questions about the territory, what success looks like in year one, and how John coaches his team.
